subcodes.first_line: Say: I beseech Thee by the Most Great Name, through which every idolater hath lamented, every denier hath cried out, and every infidel hath perished [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم الذی به ناح کل مشرک و صاح کل منکر و مات کل کافر بان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
